sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ChartWatch ASX Scans: Treasury Wine Estates, Telix Pharmaceuticals, Audinate, Accent Group, G50 Corp, Webjet
feed.summary: This article provides daily ASX stock scans based on trend following technical analysis, identifying both strong uptrends and downtrends. feed.title: Raymond James upgrades Marsh stock rating on valuation reset
feed.summary: Raymond James has upgraded Marsh (NYSE:MRSH) to Strong Buy from Outperform, despite lowering its price target to $225 from $240. The upgrade reflects a valuation reset after the stock fell 17% in six months, now trading at approximately 17 times 2026 estimated earnings, and is seen as undervalued by InvestingPro's Fair Value model. Raymond James cited Marsh's high-quality earnings, margin expansion, strong credit signal, and leadership position as key reasons for the improved rating.

feed.title: Is It Time To Revisit S&P Global (SPGI) After Its Recent Share Price Slump?

Valuation checks show divergent results: the Excess Returns model suggests the stock is roughly 5.2% overvalued with an intrinsic value of $389.19 per share, while the Price vs. Earnings approach indicates it is overvalued compared to its estimated fair P/E ratio. The article encourages investors to analyze various perspectives and consider S&P Global's role as a key data and index provider in broader capital markets.

feed.title: Hershey blasted by Reese’s family over core ingredient changes
feed.summary: Brad Reese, grandson of Reese's founder Harry Burnett Reese, has publicly criticized The Hershey Company for allegedly replacing core ingredients like milk chocolate and real peanut butter in Reese’s products with compound coatings and peanut-butter-style crémes. In an open letter, Reese argues that these changes threaten the brand's heritage, consumer trust, and Hershey's narrative of quality, suggesting the shift is due to "brand governance" rather than supply chain issues. This criticism comes at a delicate time for Hershey, as Reese’s is a flagship brand in its portfolio.

feed.title: Palantir vs. Nvidia: Wall Street Says This Is the Best AI Stock to Buy Now
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts suggest Palantir (PLTR) has greater upside potential than Nvidia (NVDA) based on current target prices, despite both AI stocks showing significant gains. Palantir is recognized for its data integration and analytics platforms, particularly its AI decisioning capabilities, and has impressive fundamentals, though its valuation is high. Nvidia maintains a dominant position in AI accelerators and provides a comprehensive ecosystem for AI development, with strong future growth expected.

The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $3.45, reflecting an annualized yield of 2.1%.

feed.title: MASCO CORP (NYSE:MAS) Presents a Compelling Case for Dependable Dividend Income
feed.summary: MASCO CORP (NYSE:MAS) is presented as a strong candidate for dependable dividend income due to its competitive yield, consistent dividend growth, and manageable payout ratio. The company's solid financial fundamentals, including strong profitability and health ratings, support the sustainability of its dividend. While growth outlook is modest, expected EPS acceleration suggests continued dividend raises, making it an attractive option for long-term investors seeking reliable income.

feed.title: Micron Technology (MU) Is Up 10.3% After 2026 HBM4 Capacity Sells Out On AI Demand
feed.summary: Micron Technology has seen its stock rise by 10.3% following record sales and the early sell-out of its 2026 HBM4 capacity, driven by demand from AI data centers. The company is committing up to $200 billion for new capacity and is prioritizing higher-value AI workloads, which is reshaping its investment narrative. While this indicates strong near-term earnings potential, increased future capacity by Micron and rivals poses a risk to sustained pricing power.

feed.title: Ross Gerber Says Elon Musk's Tesla Should Sell EV Business To Rivian, Says TSLA Brand Reduced To 'Negative'
feed.summary: Investor Ross Gerber suggests that Tesla's brand value has become "negative" due to Elon Musk's shift away from the EV business towards autonomy and robotics. Gerber proposes Tesla sell its EV division to Rivian, an EV company he believes is "leading the way," to improve sales. This comes as Tesla's Cybercab production is slated for April, while Rivian prepares to announce pricing for its R2 Crossover SUV in March.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp Lowers Holdings in Zoetis Inc. $ZTS
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp recently decreased its stake in Zoetis Inc. by 5.1% in Q3, now holding 162,140 shares valued at $23.7 million, while institutional investors collectively own about 92.8% of the company. Zoetis exceeded Q3 earnings expectations with $1.48 EPS and $2.39 billion in revenue, also setting FY2026 guidance and announcing a $0.53 quarterly dividend. Analyst sentiment toward Zoetis is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $152.91, despite some firms cutting their price targets.

feed.title: REITS SEEING HEALTHY ACCESS TO DEBT MARKETS, EQUITY ISSUANCE LAGGING: RAYMOND JAMES
feed.summary: According to Steven Loffman of Raymond James, REITs are currently experiencing a "bifurcated capital markets environment." While they have healthy access to debt markets due to strong balance sheets and manageable loan-to-value ratios, equity issuance is lagging as many REITs trade at discounts to their net asset value. Loffman anticipates increased M&A activity, particularly privatizations and consolidation across several sectors, as public REIT valuations remain below private market values, with equity issuance likely to improve later in the cycle.

feed.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Stock: Company Stockpiles $1.5B of Weight-Loss Pill Ahead of FDA Ruling
feed.summary: Eli Lilly has stockpiled $1.5 billion worth of its experimental weight-loss pill, Orforglipron, anticipating FDA approval in April 2026 to prevent supply shortages similar to those experienced with its previous GLP-1 drugs. This proactive strategy aims to compete with Novo Nordisk's oral Wegovy, which recently launched with strong sales. Eli Lilly, experiencing significant revenue growth from its weight-loss portfolio, is also investing $27 billion in new U.S. manufacturing facilities, primarily for these therapies.

feed.title: Antibiotic developer Acurx sets March 13 call on 2025 results, business update
feed.summary: Acurx Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: ACXP) will report its full year and fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Friday, March 13, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET, before U.S. markets open. Management, including CEO David P. Luci and CFO Robert G. Shawah, will host a conference call to discuss the results and provide a business update. The company's lead antibiotic candidate, Ibezapolstat, is preparing for international Phase 3 clinical trials for C. difficile Infection (CDI) and has received positive regulatory guidance from both the EMA and FDA.

feed.title: First Solar (FSLR) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) is projected to release its Q4 2025 earnings after market close on Tuesday, February 24, 2026, with analysts anticipating earnings per share of $5.22 and revenue of $1.5901 billion. The stock, which currently has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $275.61, has seen notable institutional investment activity and has a market capitalization of $24.21 billion. The company will host a conference call at 4:30 PM ET on the day of the earnings release to discuss its results.
